name: zabir-boutiques
description: Zabir Boutiques AI Commerce Platform - Astro server output on Cloudflare

scripts.build: npm run build:snapshots && npm run pwa:generate && node scripts/astro-build.mjs && npm run bundlewatch
scripts.build:with-snapshots: npm run build:snapshots && npm run pwa:generate && node scripts/astro-build.mjs
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:with-snapshots && powershell -Command "$c=Get-Content 'dist/server/wrangler.json' -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json; $c.name='zabir-boutiques-staging'; $c.vars.PUBLIC_SITE_URL='https://staging.zabirboutiques.com'; $c.vars.PUBLIC_SITE_NAME='Zabir Boutiques (staging)'; $c.d1_databases[0].database_name='zabir-db-staging'; $c.d1_databases[0].database_id='5dad7385-6221-4b6e-8b9a-afc751e6439e'; $c.kv_namespaces[0].id='a656d8ebcdfd4c8bb9ef777ab1b2bfa2'; $c.kv_namespaces[1].id='5e77b4aec22647c886970c17616f52d5'; $c.r2_buckets[0].bucket_name='zabir-product-images-staging'; $c.r2_buckets[1].bucket_name='zabir-backups-staging'; $c.r2_buckets[2].bucket_name='zabir-logs-staging'; $c.r2_buckets[3].bucket_name='zabir-email-templates-staging'; $c.r2_buckets[4].bucket_name='zabir-reports-staging'; for($i=0;$i -lt $c.queues.producers.Length;$i++){$c.queues.producers[$i].queue=$c.queues.producers[$i].queue+'-staging'}; for($i=0;$i -lt $c.queues.consumers.Length;$i++){$c.queues.consumers[$i].queue=$c.queues.consumers[$i].queue+'-staging';if($c.queues.consumers[$i].dead_letter_queue){$c.queues.consumers[$i].dead_letter_queue=$c.queues.consumers[$i].dead_letter_queue+'-staging'}}; $c.analytics_engine_datasets[0].dataset='zabir_metrics_staging'; $c|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10|Set-Content 'dist/server/wrangler.json'" && npx wrangler deploy --cwd dist/server --no-bundle
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:with-snapshots && powershell -Command "$c=Get-Content 'dist/server/wrangler.json' -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json; $c.name='zabir-boutiques-dev'; $c.vars.PUBLIC_SITE_URL='http://localhost:4321'; $c.vars.PUBLIC_SITE_NAME='Zabir Boutiques (dev)'; $c.vars.TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY='1x00000000000000000000AA'; $c.d1_databases[0].database_name='zabir-db-dev'; $c.d1_databases[0].database_id='6ba875ce-0fa5-4c14-ba08-52b016c10488'; $c.kv_namespaces[0].id='77a30a8809fb44949afb023c4024d8a3'; $c.kv_namespaces[1].id='2d335294adf741a694a20f00b8e7023a'; $c.r2_buckets[0].bucket_name='zabir-product-images-dev'; $c.r2_buckets[1].bucket_name='zabir-backups-dev'; $c.r2_buckets[2].bucket_name='zabir-logs-dev'; $c.r2_buckets[3].bucket_name='zabir-email-templates-dev'; $c.r2_buckets[4].bucket_name='zabir-reports-dev'; for($i=0;$i -lt $c.queues.producers.Length;$i++){$c.queues.producers[$i].queue=$c.queues.producers[$i].queue+'-dev'}; for($i=0;$i -lt $c.queues.consumers.Length;$i++){$c.queues.consumers[$i].queue=$c.queues.consumers[$i].queue+'-dev';if($c.queues.consumers[$i].dead_letter_queue){$c.queues.consumers[$i].dead_letter_queue=$c.queues.consumers[$i].dead_letter_queue+'-dev'}}; $c.analytics_engine_datasets[0].dataset='zabir_metrics_dev'; $c|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10|Set-Content 'dist/server/wrangler.json'" && npx wrangler deploy --cwd dist/server --no-bundle
